classes.meaning: Expected hash appears in an approved canonical or evidence manifest.
Expected hash appears in a repository-maintained artifact hash manifest.
may_support: V3 if hash computed and matched
must_not_claim: canonical archive hash unless source manifest says so

classes.meaning: Expected hash is declared inside the same report or by the reporting agent as a snapshot value.
may_support: local snapshot reproducibility if independently recomputed

classes.meaning: Expected hash comes from a named third-party tool, explorer, gateway, or API.
may_support: reference comparison if tool and query are reported

classes.meaning: Hash was computed during the same run and has no independent expected source.
Expected hash source is unknown or not reported.
